name: Wyndham Rewards Earner Business Card
perks: 8x points on Wyndham hotel purchases and gas
5x points on marketing and utility purchases
1x points on all other eligible purchases
Automatic Wyndham Rewards Diamond status (top tier)
Annual free night reward at eligible Wyndham properties
10% discount on Go Free award night bookings
drawbacks: Points only redeemable at Wyndham-family properties (limited luxury options)
Wyndham Rewards program has lower aspirational value than Marriott or Hilton
Diamond status benefit strongest at budget/midscale brands
Business card requires business entity or sole proprietor status
